fields.name: endurance
fields.description: Endurance capability — used by thread pull catalog.

fields.name: melee_attack
fields.description: Close-quarters weapon combat proficiency.

fields.name: ranged_attack
fields.description: Bow/thrown-weapon combat proficiency at range.

fields.name: awareness
fields.description: Basic consciousness; unconscious zeroes it.

fields.name: movement
fields.description: Locomotion; immobilized/rooted zeroes it.

fields.name: limb_use
fields.description: Using arms and hands; bound reduces it.

fields.name: defense
fields.description: Capability granted by the Bulwark vow.

fields.name: support
fields.description: Capability granted by the Luminary vow.

fields.name: leadership
fields.description: Capability granted by the Luminary vow.

fields.name: generation
fields.description: Creating energy, matter, or elemental forces from nothing.

fields.name: force
fields.description: Applying raw physical or magical power to overcome resistance.

fields.name: projection
fields.description: Launching directed attacks or energy at range.

fields.name: manipulation
fields.description: Controlling and redirecting existing forces or objects.

fields.name: barrier
fields.description: Creating protective shields, wards, or containment.

fields.name: traversal
fields.description: Moving through or across difficult terrain and obstacles.

fields.name: precision
fields.description: Fine motor control and accuracy for delicate tasks.

fields.name: suppression
fields.description: Nullifying, dispelling, or containing magical effects.

fields.name: transmutation
fields.description: Changing the nature or form of materials and energy.

fields.name: communication
fields.description: Conveying information across barriers or distances.

fields.name: perception
fields.description: Sensing hidden or distant things beyond normal limits.

fields.name: intimidation
fields.description: Coercing through force of presence, threats, or physical dominance.

fields.name: persuasion
fields.description: Convincing through reasoned argument, charm, and social grace.

fields.name: deception
fields.description: Misleading through misdirection, half-truths, or outright lies.

fields.name: charm
fields.description: Winning favour through personal magnetism and likability.

fields.name: inspiration
fields.description: Rousing courage, morale, or action in others.

fields.name: analysis
fields.description: Understanding systems, patterns, and hidden structures.

fields.name: exploitation
fields.description: Finding and leveraging weaknesses in defences.
